Enter your mobile number. We\'ll use this for verification. What\'s your email? Enter your email address. We recommend using Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo or any other provider. Sign Out Data and Storage Info Important info about your photos Data Storage Warning ⚠️ If you use "Clear Data" in your phone settings or uninstall the app, ALL your saved photos will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.\n\nPlease avoid clearing app data if you wish to keep your detection images. Continue Cancel Success Error OK 2 Cancel Confirm Security & Privacy Security Privacy Legal Two-Factor Authentication Add an extra layer of security to your account Biometric Authentication Use fingerprint or face recognition to unlock Change Password Update your account password Data Encryption Encrypt your data for enhanced security Privacy Mode Hide your activity from others Privacy Policy Read our privacy policy Terms of Service Read our terms of service Enable Biometric Authentication Authenticate to enable biometric login Biometric authentication enabled successfully Biometric authentication disabled Two-factor authentication disabled Please log in to enable two-factor authentication Notifications General Detection & Health Social Preferences Push Notifications Receive notifications on your device Detection Alerts Get notified when health issues are detected Reminder Notifications Receive reminders for vaccinations and checkups Friend Requests Get notified about friend requests Vibration Enable vibration for notifications Sound Play sound for notifications You can customize notification preferences for each category Emergency Contacts No Emergency Contacts Add your veterinarian or farm help contacts for quick access during emergencies Veterinarian Farm Help Emergency Other Add Emergency Contact Edit Contact Name Phone Number Notes (Optional) Save About ChickCare Version 1.0.0 About ChickCare ChickCare is an innovative mobile application designed to help poultry farmers monitor and maintain the health of their chickens. Using advanced AI technology, the app can detect early signs of diseases, particularly Infectious Bronchitis, through image and audio analysis. Features AI-Powered Detection Advanced machine learning algorithms for accurate health monitoring. Real-time Monitoring Track your flock\'s health status in real-time. Comprehensive Records Keep detailed records of all detections and health history. Smart Vaccination Schedule Get timely reminders for your flock\'s vaccination needs. Community Support Connect with other farmers and share experiences. Offline Access Access your data and records even without an internet connection. Share App Developed with care For the poultry farmers worldwide Blocked Users No blocked users Users you block will appear here Blocked Unblock Unblock %1$s? Are you sure you want to unblock %1$s? You\'ll be able to see their posts and send them messages again. Login Successfully! Analyzing chicken health... Image Detection Trends Audio Detection Trends Notifications Mark all as read (%1$d pending) No notifications yet You\'ll see notifications here when you receive them This data is permanently deleted. You cannot view this. Detection Details Notification ID Result Received At Accept Decline New Announcement Friend Request Friend Request Accepted Detection Result New Data Added Data Updated Data Deleted System Update Profile Updated New Reaction New Comment New Follower New Post Disease Alert Just now %1$dm ago %1$dh ago %1$dd ago Farm Tips & Best Practices Environment Nutrition Health Safety Proper Ventilation Maintain adequate airflow in your chicken coop to prevent respiratory diseases. Install ventilation systems that allow fresh air circulation while protecting chickens from drafts. Poor ventilation can lead to ammonia buildup and respiratory infections. Clean Water Daily Provide fresh, clean water to your chickens every day. Water containers should be cleaned regularly to prevent bacterial growth. Chickens need constant access to water for proper digestion and health. Dehydration can lead to decreased egg production and health issues. Regular Health Monitoring Use the app\'s image and audio detection features to monitor your chickens daily. Early detection of health issues can prevent disease spread and reduce losses. Watch for unusual behavior, sounds, or visual symptoms that indicate illness. Clean and Dry Coop Keep the chicken coop clean and dry at all times. Regular cleaning prevents the buildup of harmful bacteria and parasites. Wet bedding can cause foot problems and respiratory issues. Replace bedding material weekly or as needed. Balanced Nutrition Provide a balanced diet with proper feed composition suitable for your chickens\' age and purpose (laying, broiler, etc.). Include necessary vitamins and minerals. Avoid overfeeding or underfeeding, as both can cause health problems. Isolate Sick Chickens Immediately isolate any chicken showing signs of illness to prevent disease spread to the rest of the flock. Keep a separate quarantine area ready. Monitor isolated chickens closely and consult a veterinarian if symptoms persist. Temperature Control Maintain optimal temperature in the coop (18-24°C). Extreme temperatures can stress chickens and affect their health and productivity. Use heaters or cooling systems as needed, and ensure proper insulation for year-round comfort. Adequate Space Provide sufficient space for your chickens to move, perch, and nest comfortably. Overcrowding leads to stress, feather picking, and disease spread. Follow recommended space requirements: 2-4 square feet per chicken in the coop. Regular Vaccination Follow a vaccination schedule recommended by veterinarians to protect your flock from common diseases. Keep vaccination records and ensure all new birds are properly vaccinated before introducing them to the flock. Predator Protection Secure your coop with proper fencing and locks to protect chickens from predators. Check for gaps, holes, or weak spots regularly. Use motion-activated lights and secure doors at night. Predators can cause stress and injuries to your flock.
